header.title: FAQs
header.subtitleHtml: Modern website widgets—fast to launch, easy to customize, and built to help you convert.

faqs.answer: Clickeen is a widget SaaS platform that lets you add polished, high-performing widgets to your website in minutes—no heavy dev work required.
faqs.question: What is Clickeen?

faqs.answer: Yes. The Free plan includes 1 active widget with essential features so you can try Clickeen on a live site.
faqs.question: Do you offer a free plan?

faqs.answer: Create your widget, copy the embed code, and paste it right before the closing </body> tag on your website. Changes you make in Clickeen update instantly.
faqs.question: How do I install a widget on my site?

faqs.answer: Launch faster with flexible design controls, simple updates, and reliable performance—so your team can ship improvements without maintaining custom code.
faqs.question: Why use Clickeen instead of building widgets from scratch?
